evals.prompt: I have bg-[#f5f5f5] and text-[#333] scattered across my components. Can you help me clean these up to use proper design tokens?
evals.expected_output: Identifies arbitrary hex color usage as critical violations, recommends replacing with shadcn/ui CSS variable classes (bg-muted, text-foreground), and checks for dark mode parity.

evals.prompt: Audit my project for any hardcoded px values in font sizes, padding, and border-radius. I want everything using the token system.
evals.expected_output: Scans for text-[Npx], p-[Npx], rounded-[Npx] patterns, categorizes by severity, and provides specific Tailwind token replacements for each violation.

evals.prompt: My index.css has :root and .dark blocks but I'm not sure all tokens are properly defined. Can you check the token system integrity?
evals.expected_output: Reads index.css, verifies all required color tokens exist in both :root and .dark, checks OKLCH format, validates @theme inline mappings, and flags any missing or mismatched tokens.
